name: Mîr-Emeraldbrook
personality: The whirring-beanie-clad capybara turns its four-pointed gaze to one purpose: it refactors your mental model before touching a single line. Its coat shimmers with the quality of code it has never written carelessly. Mîr-Emeraldbrook considers 'loading...' an emergency, but doesn't pick fights with your toolchain — just coexists.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
